title: General Policy for the Use of Artificial Intelligence
summary: Applies to all government entities and sets principles on human decision-making, safety, fairness, transparency, accountability, integrity, privacy and data protection, while requiring compliance with the Personal Data Protection Law, state information protection rules, open data rules, and GCC AI ethics guidance.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.ai_governance_ethics: National policy for safe and ethical AI use by Bahraini government entities.
theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.generative_ai: National AI policy governing safe and ethical AI use by Bahraini government entities.
theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.autonomous_smart_system: National policy governing responsible AI use by Bahraini government entities.

notes: Related instruments: GCC Guiding Manual on AI Ethics, Personal Data Protection Law No. 30 of 2018, State Information and Documents Law No. 16 of 2014, Open Data Policy
